counters.description: this is the kind of matchup where without a pressure from your jungler you will need to get more defensive items and sustain early game. going full ap without sustain only with good jungler pressure, not a full clear enjoyers. if his wave management is good and he isn't first timer either you can't really do much.

he can dive you without a problem so taking some early armor is recommended, insanely strong champion who can outtrade you even while being behind. however u can farm but please keep a track of enemy jungle in case if they were about to dive you.

matchup isn't the worst but starting from his level 3 he has a easy way of punishing you with his shadow and procing electrocute. consider getting armor like warden mail first base and you will be able to counter his burst, when he is lacking it you can have a chance to trade with him. electro/resolve unless u have balls to go without resolve.
this is the kind of matchup where without a pressure from your jungler you will need to get more defensive items and sustain early game.
this is the kind of matchup where without a pressure from your jungler you will need to get more defensive items and sustain early game.
perma push, tanky, burst, good sustain. try to stay efficient wait for jungler to help you.

yone same as you scales great. its quite skilled matchup however you win him with cloth armor and 4 potions with nether blade start. he is gonna have hard time killing you with frozen heart , but he is aswell so squishy while you are full ap. quite easy matchup to survive

ryze dps in early game against you is sick, its a literal machinegun that pokes you through the wave 24/7 and outrades you. here i would just consider full ap to be a dangerous threat against him. but you might be lacking sustain without jungler pressure.

she is doing great against you, way too much damage with conqeuor. try to utilize second wind with doran sheld in this matchup. requires good mechanics and a lot of respect towards her. try to stay efficient and play around his mistakes or mana sustain.

good orianna, conneceted with wave mangement isn't a easy matchup. she can outtrade you well and setup better recalls than you. here it all depends how good of a player is she. still i would consider going full ap to a big threat. doran shield start.
simply play around his w, if he wont get 2 stacks on you, then its fine.

simply just cloth armor, try to let her push towards you so you wont get oneshotted level 3 on his go in. losing some cs in order to keep wave in your "safe zone" is  okey. once you prevent her dps by getting additional armor she can't really do much against you. bone plating+cloth and electrocute. still those kind of matchups requires a lot of awareness and predicting opponents, most of the time you can't match her roams.
i know u wont ever find him but bro, this champ perma shoves on you and even if u kill him he is respawing himself? its sick matchup, but you wont ever encounter it  ;d

outrades you early, check if she has doran shield/second wind and fleet footwork  since she might outsustian you too. electrocute matchup, play around her mistakes and energy bar. get oracle lens starting from level 6 to track her in w.

unkillable brick who can outroam you and offers so much cc for the team, only way you could try to trade him is with conqeuror but imo play efficient for scaling but still your team has a hard time against him. try to match his roams with tp if needed.
hard to kill, once cage and you might lose half of the hp. focus on staying efficent get good sustain like doran shield, resolve.
huge amount of burst and kill potential in early game against you, one charm and laning is doomed. if you are not feeling too confident get more sustain and doran shield.

impossible to kill due to his sustain, without a jungler its quite hard to abuse him. he can dive you, poke under turret etc. one of the scariest matchups especially with goredrinker build. a lot depends on your teamcomp. get cloth armor 4 pots if he is goo.d

i hate zoe, i hate playing against her. i would go full ap but with resolve or atleast doran shield. her bubble generates so much pressure on you under the turret and during laning, you gotta play around it.
play around her jump towards you, get boneplating with resolve.  she is doing great against you on every phase of the game and cancels your riftwalk with her ultimate.  don't push.

insane damage early game, let him push towards you, get cloth armor 4 potions you can start nether blade. you gonna outscale this matchup quite well but it still requires so much awareness agains him.

synergies.description: best champion to help you snowball through early game, submissive shaco otp is all you need for duoq.
1 vs 9 potential, quite illegal cuz u can climb with your legs with her.
insane pressure, insane ability kit for snowballing you early.
every early game jungler is great with you as long as he wont invade 24/7 without prio from his kassadin ;)
perfect combination, u can force with going in + global pressure.
soraka, cuz she heals ;)
speeding up, another life great one ;)
double trouble you know.
lack of cc, if it comes to 2 vs 2 fights works good.
lack of cc, if it comes to 2 vs 2 fights works good.
rengar playstyle in early game doesn't fit yours at all. his invade potential is limited and can't do much if it comes to forcing
she needs non-minion champs in her early game to actually do a lot. u guys are double, insanely weak in 2 vs 2.
double ap, hard early game.
invading jungler+ap when you are kassadin. i had to flash at level 3 to the enemy red pit with one nida otp.
